{"id":"project-LICHEN-uhqq","title":"coap_keys.c: uninitialized day variable in encode_iso8601_timestamp","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Line: 589

The encode_iso8601_timestamp function declares 'day' without initialization:
```c
uint8_t day;
```

If the inner for loop (lines 606-617) completes without breaking (which shouldn't happen with valid timestamps, but could with edge cases), 'day' remains uninitialized and is used in snprintf at line 624.

Impact: Undefined behavior leading to garbage timestamps in edge cases.

Category: CORRECTNESS - uninitialized variable","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:05.236367Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:05.236409Z"}
